title: PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES - 211info
text: MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childbirth education, newborn care classes, safe sleep workshop, breastfeeding workshop/support, and other classes which vary by season. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Most classes are for parents and other caregivers of children under the age of 5 Hours: Class times vary Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main line (503) 249-5801 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website to register online FEES: Most classes are free, others have a fee DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 41st and Halsey. Street parking. Do not park in Trader Joe's or Comcast lots. Directly across from Hollywood Transit Center (MAX Red and Blue lines, bus lines 75 and 77) Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Children's Play Groups Family Support Centers/Outreach Financial Literacy Training Parent Support Groups Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER
